Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Jimmy Ly of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendants Hoffman Construction Co. and Irwin's Automotive Enterprises, Inc.
Angela L. Flood of GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP (619-696-6700), appearing for defendant Marshco Auto Parts, Inc.

RULING:
Not contested, not argued, and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Maintaining the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(a). The Court did not consider the conditional non-opposition by Marshco Auto Parts, Inc. and Albert D. Seeno Construction Co., Inc. for failure to lodge courtesy copies with the Court pursuant to Local Rule 2.7B. The June 26, 2023 trial date is vacated. The new trial date is August 7, 2023 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is August 18, 2023. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the initial June 26, 2023 trial date. Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than June 23, 2023. Responses to the demand are due no later than July 7, 2023. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Pang Ly via electronic mail by July 28, 2023 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, August 3, 2023 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)
